customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working reliably, and appreciate that installation is free. The product receives positive feedback for its value, taste, and water quality, with one customer noting it increases water sweetness. Customers find it easy to use and professional, though opinions about service are mixed, with some praising it while others report poor service.

reviews.author: Ashish
reviews.title: Aquaguard Installation experience
reviews.body: The service technician arrived on time, which I appreciate. However, the installation was done in a hurry, and he left without checking whether the water purifier was working properly. Shortly after the installation, the purifier started leaking and is still not usable. Additionally, I was charged ₹800 for two new parts required for the installation. I requested an invoice for these parts, but I have still not received one. Overall, the installation experience was disappointing. I hope the issue is resolved quickly and the invoice is provided.

reviews.author: Chandan Yadav
reviews.title: Budget friendly
reviews.body: Product is good and working fine as of now after one week. It make some sound while working but remain silent afterwards

reviews.author: Swathi Ksp
reviews.title: Truly a delightful water purifier - Aquaguard
reviews.body: I am writing this review in the first week of purchase... so far it is very good experience Delivery - Excellent Installation - Excellent Overall - Excellent, compact size, no noise, good condition, good quality of water Feedback for improvements: 1. Water quality - Good, however TDS is around 25, I was expecting around 50 levels because of adding back minerals. Hoping this will better over the time. 2. Water wastage is more in spite of company claim of less water wastage. Hoping this will better over the time. 3. Outer body plastic quality should be good. For now, it seems average to below av

reviews.author: siddu telkar
reviews.title: Nothing
reviews.body: Good product. Installation was done on time, and the water tastes clean. The purifier looks good and is easy to use. Happy with the purchase. Worth the price.

reviews.author: ANU

Main dhanda is to sell some accessory in double price in cash with no bill. email id in app is fake does not work. water tank cover is not properly sealed some dust or liquid if dropped on top easily go in it. Eureka Forbes has become Sadakchaap like other Thousands of AQUA***** type companies who give RO in 3000-4000. so it is same item but they cash on brand name & marketting of Nano pure.
